description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Fuzz CI that runs on every pull request to the dev branch and on a scheduled cron job every Sunday at midnight. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents and use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test fuzzing with address, undefined, and memory sanitizers. For each sanitizer, build fuzzers for the pcapplusplus project using google/oss-fuzz, run the fuzzers for 600 seconds, and upload any crash artifacts if the build succeeds but the run fails.
